title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.055 - Capital stock — par value
text:
362.055.  Capital stock — par value. — The capital stock of such corporation shall be divided into shares having a par value.
(RSMo 1939 § 7945, A.L. 1959 H.B. 144, A.L. 1963 p. 448, A.L. 1967 p. 445) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5349; 1919 § 11732; 1909 § 1097
